figures.caption: Figure 1. Architecture of the CGMPINN framework: a neural network approximator, automatic differentiation for PDE-compliant derivatives, the CGM module (GMM fitting, precision modulation, and curriculum scheduling), and an optional self-adaptive loss balancing mechanism.

Table 13. Ablation study comparing GMMPINN, CLPINN, and CGMPINN on all benchmark PDEs. All experimental settings are identical to those in Section 3. Bold indicates the best result in each group.
